sessionStart.bash: for d in "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/oh-my-copilot" "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/_direct/Lee-SiHyeon--oh-my-copilot"; do [ -f "$d/scripts/session-start.sh" ] && exec bash "$d/scripts/session-start.sh"; done

sessionEnd.bash: for d in "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/oh-my-copilot" "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/_direct/Lee-SiHyeon--oh-my-copilot"; do [ -f "$d/scripts/session-end.sh" ] && exec bash "$d/scripts/session-end.sh"; done

preToolUse.bash: for d in "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/oh-my-copilot" "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/_direct/Lee-SiHyeon--oh-my-copilot"; do [ -f "$d/scripts/pre-tool-use.sh" ] && exec bash "$d/scripts/pre-tool-use.sh"; done
